---
name: New framework mapping proposal
about: Propose adding a new security framework to the coverage matrix
title: '[FRAMEWORK] Add <FrameworkName> mapping for <SourceList>'
labels: enhancement, new-framework
assignees: emmanuelgjr
---

## Framework details

**Framework name and version:**
<!-- e.g., NIST AI RMF 2.0, PCI DSS v5.0 -->

**Framework URL (publicly accessible):**
<!-- Must be freely accessible without payment for core content -->

**Source list(s) to map:**
- [ ] LLM Top 10 2025 (LLM01–LLM10)
- [ ] Agentic Top 10 2026 (ASI01–ASI10)
- [ ] DSGAI 2026 (DSGAI01–DSGAI21)

## Justification

**Why does this framework matter for GenAI security practitioners?**
<!-- 2–3 sentences: who uses this framework and what decision does the mapping enable? -->

**Is this framework used in a regulated sector or jurisdiction?**
<!-- e.g., EU, US federal, healthcare, finance, OT/ICS -->

**What gap does this fill that existing mappings don't cover?**
<!-- Why isn't one of the 17 existing frameworks sufficient? -->

## Coverage estimate

**How many of the source list entries map to this framework?**
<!-- e.g., all 10 LLM entries, ~15 of 21 DSGAI entries -->

**Are you willing to write the mapping file(s)?**
- [ ] Yes — I will submit a PR
- [ ] Partial — I can draft but need review
- [ ] No — proposing for community to pick up

## Conflict of interest

**Are you affiliated with the framework body or a vendor that benefits from this mapping?**
<!-- Disclosure required per GOVERNANCE.md; does not disqualify the proposal -->
